
func (s *Server) handlePageSettingsPOSTPreview(
	w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request,
) {
	if !s.checkIsDSReq(w, r) {
		return
	}
	sess, _, ok := s.auth(w, r)
	if !ok {
		return
	}

	sse := datastar.NewSSE(w, r, datastar.WithCompression())
	p := testapp.PageSettings{
	App: s.app,
}
	body, err := p.POSTPreview(sse, sess)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, sse, "handling action PageSettings.Preview", err)
		return
	}
	genericHead, err := s.app.Head(r)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "generating generic head for PageSettings.POSTPreview", err)
		return
	}
	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, genericHead, nil, body, nil,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering response of PageSettings.POSTPreview", err)
		return
	}
}
